ddls:
CREATE TABLE "intraday_prices" (
  "price_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each price entry */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the stock symbol */,
  "datetime" TEXT /* Timestamp of the price data */,
  "open_price" REAL /* Opening price of the stock */,
  "high_price" REAL /* Highest price of the stock during the minute */,
  "low_price" REAL /* Lowest price of the stock during the minute */,
  "close_price" REAL /* Closing price of the stock */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Volume of shares traded during the minute */,
  "only_date" TEXT /* Date of the price data */,
  "price_change" REAL /* Price change from previous minute */,
  "price_change_percentage" REAL /* Price change percentage from previous minute */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("price_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_intraday_prices_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stocks" (
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock */,
  "stock_symbol" TEXT /* Stock symbol (e.g., AAPL, GOOGL) */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Name of the company */,
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the stock exchange */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector of the company */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry of the company */,
  "ipo_date" TEXT /* IPO date of the company */,
  "market_cap" REAL /* Market capitalization of the company */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the company */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stock_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stocks_sector FOREIGN KEY ("sector") REFERENCES sectors ("sector_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stocks_industry FOREIGN KEY ("industry") REFERENCES industries ("industry_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stocks_exchange_id FOREIGN KEY ("exchange_id") REFERENCES exchanges ("exchange_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "exchanges" (
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each exchange */,
  "exchange_name" TEXT /* Name of the stock exchange */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the exchange */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the exchange */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website of the exchange */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("exchange_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sectors" (
  "sector_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sector */,
  "sector_name" TEXT /* Name of the sector */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the sector */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sector_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "industries" (
  "industry_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each industry */,
  "industry_name" TEXT /* Name of the industry */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the industry */,
  "sector_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the sector */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("industry_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_industries_sector_id FOREIGN KEY ("sector_id") REFERENCES sectors ("sector_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., trader, analyst, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user account */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trading_strategies" (
  "strategy_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trading strategy */,
  "strategy_name" TEXT /* Name of the trading strategy */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the trading strategy */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the strategy */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("strategy_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trading_strategies_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "strategy_stocks" (
  "strategy_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the trading strategy */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the stock */,
  "entry_date" TEXT /* Date when the stock was added to the strategy */,
  "exit_date" TEXT /* Date when the stock was removed from the strategy */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the stock in the strategy (e.g., active, closed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("strategy_id", "stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trades" (
  "trade_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trade */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who executed the trade */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock being traded */,
  "trade_date" TEXT /* Date of the trade */,
  "trade_type" TEXT /* Type of trade (e.g., buy, sell) */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of shares traded */,
  "price" REAL /* Price at which the trade was executed */,
  "strategy_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trading strategy (if applicable) */,
  "trade_fee" REAL /* Trade fee */,
  "trade_commission" REAL /* Trade commission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trade_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trades_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trades_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trades_strategy_id FOREIGN KEY ("strategy_id") REFERENCES trading_strategies ("strategy_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trade_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "trade_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trade */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the action */,
  "action_date" TEXT /* Date of the action */,
  "action_type" TEXT /* Type of action (e.g., executed, cancelled) */,
  "details" TEXT /* Details of the action */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trade_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trade_logs_trade_id FOREIGN KEY ("trade_id") REFERENCES trades ("trade_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "portfolio_positions" (
  "position_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each position */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of shares held */,
  "average_cost" REAL /* Average cost per share */,
  "current_value" REAL /* Current value of the position */,
  "entry_date" TEXT /* Date when the position was opened */,
  "exit_date" TEXT /* Date when the position was closed */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the position (e.g., open, closed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("position_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_portfolio_positions_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_portfolio_positions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "portfolio_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "performance_date" TEXT /* Date of the performance data */,
  "total_value" REAL /* Total value of the portfolio */,
  "total_profit_loss" REAL /* Total profit or loss of the portfolio */,
  "return_on_investment" REAL /* Return on investment (ROI) of the portfolio */,
  "profit_loss_percentage" REAL /* Profit/loss percentage of the portfolio */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_portfolio_performance_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_news" (
  "news_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each news item */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the news item */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the news item */,
  "publish_date" TEXT /* Date the news was published */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the news */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock affected by the news (if applicable) */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the news (e.g., earnings, mergers) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("news_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_news_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "financial_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each financial report */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of financial report (e.g., 10-K, 10-Q) */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date of the report */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the report */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the report file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the report was uploaded */,
  "fiscal_year" INTEGER /* Fiscal year of the report */,
  "fiscal_quarter" INTEGER /* Fiscal quarter of the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_financial_reports_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "watchlists" (
  "watchlist_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each watchlist */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "watchlist_name" TEXT /* Name of the watchlist */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the watchlist */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("watchlist_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_watchlists_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "watchlist_stocks" (
  "watchlist_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the watchlist */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the stock */,
  "added_date" TEXT /* Date the stock was added to the watchlist */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes about the stock in the watchlist */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("watchlist_id", "stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g., price above, price below) */,
  "alert_value" REAL /* Value at which the alert should trigger */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the alert (e.g., active, triggered, cancelled) */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the alert was created */,
  "expiration_date" TEXT /* Date the alert expires */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alert_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* ID of the alert */,
  "action_date" TEXT /* Date of the action */,
  "action_type" TEXT /* Type of action (e.g., triggered, cancelled) */,
  "details" TEXT /* Details of the action */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alert_logs_alert_id FOREIGN KEY ("alert_id") REFERENCES alerts ("alert_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_preferences" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "language" TEXT /* Preferred language */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Preferred timezone */,
  "notification_method" TEXT /* Notification method (e.g., email, SMS) */,
  "preferred_exchange" INTEGER /* Preferred stock exchange */,
  "default_watchlist" TEXT /* Default watchlist name */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_preferences_preferred_exchange FOREIGN KEY ("preferred_exchange") REFERENCES exchanges ("exchange_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "recommendations" (
  "recommendation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each recommendation */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock */,
  "recommendation_date" TEXT /* Date the recommendation was made */,
  "recommendation_type" TEXT /* Type of recommendation (e.g., buy, sell, hold) */,
  "recommendation_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the recommendation */,
  "target_price" REAL /* Target price for the stock */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("recommendation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "recommendation_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "recommendation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the recommendation */,
  "action_date" TEXT /* Date of the action */,
  "action_type" TEXT /* Type of action (e.g., updated, deleted) */,
  "details" TEXT /* Details of the action */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stock_splits" (
  "split_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock split */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock */,
  "split_date" TEXT /* Date of the stock split */,
  "split_ratio" REAL /* Ratio of the stock split (e.g., 2:1, 3:2) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("split_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dividends" (
  "dividend_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dividend */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock */,
  "dividend_date" TEXT /* Date of the dividend */,
  "dividend_amount" REAL /* Amount of the dividend per share */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dividend_id")
)
